original_text:
The terra sigillata comprises cups bowls Drag.
37, Drag. 33, plates Drag.18/31 and mortaria Drag. 45. Two
fragments are Argonne Ware decorated with roller-stamps, these bowls of type Chenet 320 date to A.D. 320-410.
Furthermore a prismatic glass bottle Isings 50, mural
fragments and a coin struck under the reign of Hadrianus
are in the RMO collection.
